# Calculator Library

## Core Functions

Implement a Python module `calculator.py` with functions:
- add(a, b) returns a + b
- subtract(a, b) returns a - b
- multiply(a, b) returns a * b
- divide(a, b) returns a / b, raises ValueError on division by zero

## Tests

Implement `test_calculator.py` with pytest tests covering all four functions
including the division by zero edge case.
